claims.claim: Using a `llama.cpp`-based harness at temperature zero, we evaluate two quantized instruct models—Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-Q4_K_M and Phi-4-mini-instruct-Q4_K_M—across 72 items each (24 per probe family).

claims.claim: If the probe split is informative, we expect high accuracy on direct facts (parametric recall is well-established in instruct models), high accuracy on counterfactual overrides (instruction-following should dominate when the override is explicit), and lower accuracy on synthetic reasoning (which cannot be solved by recall).
